meaning: adj.模仿的,好模仿的,[生]拟态的,[晶]类似的
examples: Both realism and naturalism are mimetic systems or practices of representation.
Unlike other songs, it has no lyrics, but only mimetic words.
Onomatopoeia and mimetic words are a striking feature of japanese vocabulary.
It is the first approval for an incretin mimetic drug, which stimulates insulin secretion.
In 1920, a profile and a figure qualified a performer as much as mimetic talent.
